101010101011001000111110110111110001000000110011001110011100010100100000001 - ASI: 30

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  10 = 1 * 0
  11 = 1 * 1
  000 = 0 * 00
  001 = 00 * 1
  101 = 10 * 1
  1001 = 1 * 001
  1010 = 10 * 10
  1111 = 11 * 11
  00000 = 00 * 000
  00010 = 000 * 10
  11001 = 11 * 001
  101101 = 101 * 101
  1001000 = 1001 * 000
  1100010 = 11 * 00010
  00000001 = 00000 * 001
  10101010 = 1010 * 1010
  100111001 = 1001 * 11001
  111100010 = 1111 * 00010
  0000011001 = 00000 * 11001
  1011001000 = 101 * 1001000
  1111101101 = 1111 * 101101
  11000101001 = 1100010 * 1001
  101010101011001000 = 10101010 * 1011001000
  0000011001100111001 = 0000011001 * 100111001
  1100010100100000001 = 11000101001 * 00000001
  1111101101111100010 = 1111101101 * 111100010
  1010101010110010001111101101111100010 = 101010101011001000 * 1111101101111100010
  00000110011001110011100010100100000001 = 0000011001100111001 * 1100010100100000001
  101010101011001000111110110111110001000000110011001110011100010100100000001 = 1010101010110010001111101101111100010 * 00000110011001110011100010100100000001
